title: AIR NEW ZEALAND LIMITED v E TŪ INCORPORATED LIMITED and ANOR
text:
IN THE EMPLOYMENT RELATIONS AUTHORITY
AUCKLAND
I TE RATONGA AHUMANA TAIMAHI
TĀMAKI MAKAURAU ROHE
[2026] NZERA
Recommendation 3
3440084
BETWEEN AIR NEW ZEALAND
LIMITED
Applicant
AND E TŪ INCORPORATED
LIMITED
First Respondent
FLIGHT ATTENDANTS’
ASSOCIATION OF NEW
ZEALAND
Second Respondent
Member of Authority: Marija Urlich
Representatives: Andrew Caisley, counsel for the Applicant
Emily Griffin, counsel for the First Respondent
Angus Drumm, counsel for the Second Respondent
Investigation Meeting: On the papers
Determination: 16 April 2026
RECOMMENDATION OF THE AUTHORITY
[1] During this facilitated bargaining the Authority issued a recommendation on 7
April 2026 (the 7 April 2026 recommendation) which directed that it is not made public
subject to comment of the parties and further order of the Authority.1
[2] The parties have provided comment. They all seek the 7 April 2026
recommendation is made public.
1 Air New Zealand v E tu Inc Ltd & FAANZ [2026] NZERA Recommendation 2 at [23].

[3] I am satisfied making the 7 April 2026 recommendation public will assist the
parties in concluding collective agreements and so order.
[4] This recommendation is also public.
Marija Urlich
Member of the Employment Relations Authority
parties: AIR NEW ZEALAND LIMITED v E TŪ INCORPORATED LIMITED and ANOR
